feed.title: Oxford County Probate Court
feed.subtitle: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/rss2 exists but is not probate-specific. Static overview of court schedule and named judge/register.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Oxford County Probate Court
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
